elements.name: Booking - Book a kost with filter 24 hours

embeddings.name: Booking - Book a kost with filter 24 hours

steps.name: user login as Tenant via phone number "rheza tenant"
user click on Mamikos Promo Ngebut pop up
user click filter kos with "Akses 24 Jam"
user turn on the booking langsung filter
user dismiss ftue screen pop up
user click on ajukan sewa button
user click on terms and condition button
user click on ajukan sewa in booking confirmation page
